raw_prompt: The Boss asks: "Calculate the expected duration of this Agile epic using PERT. Optimistic time is 10 days, most likely time is 15 days, pessimistic time is 30 days."
raw_response:
METHOD: PERT Expected Duration
INPUTS:
  O  = 10 days  [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  M  = 15 days  [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  P  = 30 days  [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
FORMULA: TE = (O + 4M + P) / 6
SUBSTITUTION: TE = (10 + 4*15 + 30) / 6 = (10 + 60 + 30) / 6 = 100 / 6 = 16.67
RESULT: Expected duration = 16.7 days  [unit: days]
SENSITIVITY: sigma = (P - O)/6 = 3.33 days; P80 ~= 19.4 days
ASSUMPTIONS: beta-distribution PERT, independent estimates.
evidence_quotes: No DATA UNAVAILABLE for supplied data
